CustomField.description: Email Invocations usage with visual indicator. Shows percentage of limit consumed with warning (80%) and danger (90%) thresholds.
CustomField.formula: IF(LimitsEmailInvocationsMax__c = 0, "✅ N/A", IF(LimitsEmailInvocationsConsumed__c / LimitsEmailInvocationsMax__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.EmailInvocations.TransactionRedPercent__c / 100, "⛔", IF(LimitsEmailInvocationsConsumed__c / LimitsEmailInvocationsMax__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.EmailInvocations.TransactionAmberPercent__c / 100, "⚠️", "✅") ) & " " & TEXT(ROUND(LimitsEmailInvocationsConsumed__c / LimitsEmailInvocationsMax__c * 100, 1)) & "% (" & TEXT(LimitsEmailInvocationsConsumed__c) & " / " & TEXT(LimitsEmailInvocationsMax__c) & ")" )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Email Invocations usage with visual indicator. Shows percentage of limit consumed with warning (80%) and danger (90%) thresholds.
CustomField.label: Email Invocations
